status_definitions.At Risk: One or more stages approaching or past SLA
status_definitions.Blocked: Hard blocker preventing progress — critical action required

projects.name: Al Dhafra Solar Phase 3
projects.location: Al Dhafra Region, 80km SW of Abu Dhabi City
projects.last_update_note: Municipality building permit application submitted. Awaiting acknowledgement.

stages.name: Pre-Application & Initial Screening
stages.notes: Initial screening passed. Minor clarification requested on land use classification — resolved.

stages.name: Grid Connection Approval
stages.notes: Grid impact assessment required resubmission with updated 2024 load data. Resolved.

stages.name: Environmental & Civil Aviation Clearance
stages.notes: EIA approved after one round of queries on solar glare impact. GCAA clearance for structure heights approved.

stages.name: Technical & Safety Approvals
stages.authority: Civil Defence + TDRA + Ministry of Interior
stages.notes: Civil Defence fire safety plan approved. TDRA telecom NOC issued. Security clearance granted.

stages.name: Construction Permit
stages.notes: Building permit application submitted. Structural drawings under review.

stages.name: Federal Operating License
stages.notes: Pending Stage 5 completion.

projects.name: Sharjah Coastal Wind Farm
projects.last_update_note: DEWA NOC pending for 23 days. SLA was 15 days. Grid impact assessment flagged for outdated 2019 load data.

stages.name: Pre-Application & Initial Screening
stages.notes: Pre-application screening passed. Land classification confirmed as energy development zone.

stages.name: Grid Connection Approval
stages.notes: SEWA NOC pending 36 days against 15-day SLA. Likely cause: Grid impact assessment references 2019 load baseline. Updated 2024 figures required.

stages.name: Environmental & Civil Aviation Clearance
stages.notes: Pending Stage 2 approval. Marine coastal impact study will need to be included in EIA.

stages.name: Technical & Safety Approvals
stages.notes: Not yet initiated.

stages.name: Construction Permit
stages.notes: Not yet initiated.

stages.name: Federal Operating License
stages.notes: Not yet initiated.

ai_flags.message: SEWA Grid NOC is 21 days past SLA. Likely cause: outdated 2019 load data in grid assessment. Recommend escalation.
GCAA NOC application not yet submitted. This is a long-lead item (20 working days). Should be initiated in parallel.

projects.name: RAK Offshore Floating Solar
projects.last_update_note: EIA rejected by MOCCAE on 08 March 2025. Marine ecosystem impact study deemed insufficient. 30-day resubmission window open.

stages.name: Pre-Application & Initial Screening
stages.notes: EIA submitted to MOCCAE. Rejected 08 March 2025 — marine ecosystem impact study insufficient. Coral reef impact radius not specified. 30-day resubmission deadline: 08 April 2025. If missed, site reservation is forfeited.

stages.name: Grid Connection Approval
stages.notes: Pending Stage 1 unblocking.

stages.name: Environmental & Civil Aviation Clearance
stages.notes: Offshore project requires additional Coast Guard clearance. Estimated 75 days.

stages.name: Technical & Safety Approvals
stages.notes: Offshore installation requires maritime safety assessment.

stages.name: Construction Permit
stages.notes: Not yet initiated.

stages.name: Federal Operating License
stages.notes: Not yet initiated.

noc_tracker.rejection_reason: Marine ecosystem impact study insufficient. Coral reef impact radius not specified. Full marine baseline survey required.

ai_flags.message: EIA rejected by MOCCAE. Resubmission deadline: 08 April 2025 (26 days). Missing: marine ecosystem study with coral reef impact radius. AED 8.2B site reservation at risk.
Coast Guard offshore permit pending 62 days with no SLA published. Direct follow-up recommended.

projects.name: Barakah Nuclear Extension — Unit 5
projects.location: Barakah Nuclear Energy Plant, Al Dhafra
projects.last_update_note: Federal Operating License under final review. Expected approval within 5 working days.

stages.name: Environmental & Civil Aviation Clearance
stages.notes: FANR nuclear safety review extended. Standard for nuclear projects.

stages.name: Federal Operating License
stages.notes: Under final ministerial review. All documentation complete. Expected approval within 5 working days.

projects.name: KIZAD Green Hydrogen Hub
projects.last_update_note: New H2 safety guidelines published jointly by ADNOC and EAD effective 01 April 2025. High-pressure storage safety study must be updated to comply before Stage 3 can proceed.

stages.name: Grid Connection Approval
stages.notes: Minor delay — electrolyzer load profile required additional modelling.

stages.name: Environmental & Civil Aviation Clearance
stages.notes: New H2 safety guidelines (ADNOC/EAD, effective 01 April 2025) require update to high-pressure storage safety study. EAD review paused pending updated submission.

noc_tracker.hold_reason: Pending updated H2 safety study per new April 2025 guidelines

ai_flags.message: New ADNOC/EAD H2 safety guidelines effective 01 April 2025. High-pressure storage safety study must be resubmitted. Stage 3 cannot complete without this.
ADDC water usage permit pending 62 days against 15-day SLA. Hydrogen electrolysis is water-intensive — this permit is on the critical path.

projects.name: Mohammed bin Rashid Solar Park Phase 6
projects.last_update_note: DEWA self-approving grid connection as developer and operator. Civil Defence technical review in progress.

stages.name: Grid Connection Approval
stages.notes: DEWA is both developer and grid operator — self-approval process.

stages.name: Technical & Safety Approvals
stages.notes: Civil Defence technical review ongoing. TDRA NOC approved. On track.

projects.name: Ajman Industrial Solar Rooftop Programme
projects.last_update_note: AADC grid connection study underway. On schedule.

stages.name: Grid Connection Approval
stages.notes: Rooftop distributed generation — AADC processing 47 individual site connection applications under one master agreement.

projects.name: Fujairah Gas-to-Power Peaker Plant
projects.last_update_note: Civil Defence emergency response plan hard blocked — gas storage buffer zone violation (340m vs required 500m). Developer unresponsive for 15 days. Ministry intervention required.

stages.name: Technical & Safety Approvals
stages.notes: Civil Defence blocked on updated emergency response plan. Gas storage proximity to residential zone (340m) flagged as exceeding standard 500m buffer. Developer unresponsive for 15 days.

noc_tracker.block_reason: Emergency response plan rejected — gas storage buffer zone violation (340m vs required 500m)

ai_flags.message: Civil Defence emergency response plan blocked for 43 days past SLA. Gas storage 340m from residential zone — 160m short of required 500m buffer. Developer unresponsive for 15 days. Ministry intervention recommended.
ADDC water NOC pending 57 days against 10-day SLA. No follow-up recorded.

projects.name: Dubai South Logistics Solar + BESS
projects.last_update_note: Initial screening complete. Grid connection application to DEWA submitted 01 March 2025.

noc_tracker.notes: BESS fire safety is a new requirement — Civil Defence has specific guidelines for lithium-ion battery storage.

ai_flags.message: BESS installations require specific Civil Defence fire safety NOC under new 2024 lithium-ion storage guidelines. This is often overlooked for solar+storage projects. Recommend initiating early.

projects.name: Abu Dhabi Transmission Grid Upgrade — Corridor T7
projects.location: Abu Dhabi to Al Ain 400kV Transmission Corridor
projects.last_update_note: Wayleave acquisition for 14km section crossing Baniyas residential expansion zone stalled. Abu Dhabi Municipality demanding revised route alignment.

stages.name: Environmental & Route Approval
stages.notes: MOCCAE environmental clearance approved. Military corridor clearance approved. Abu Dhabi Municipality blocking 14km wayleave — Baniyas residential expansion zone conflict. New route alignment submission required.

stages.name: Construction Permit
stages.notes: 280km corridor will require coordinated permits across multiple municipal authorities.

noc_tracker.block_reason: Baniyas residential expansion zone conflict. New route alignment demanded.

ai_flags.message: Abu Dhabi Municipality Baniyas wayleave blocked 73 days past SLA. Root cause: residential expansion zone conflict on 14km section. Requires route realignment study. Estimated 8-12 week delay if not escalated.
14 road crossing permits pending. Roads Authority has not responded to any. Bundle follow-up recommended rather than individual chases.

critical_deadlines_30_days.issue: EIA resubmission deadline — site reservation forfeiture risk
Federal Operating License — final approval expected
